sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16671" key="a)stropoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρο-ποιέω</orth> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τι</itype> <sense id="n16671.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make a constellation of</tr_> it, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.164</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
